zh.lifeSummary: 當Thamsine Channon於1598年12月27日出生在英國英格蘭戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗時，她的父親Henry Channon16歲，母親Johanna Drewe42歲。她於1622年11月28日與Francis Matthews在英國英格蘭戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1690年在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯享年92歲，埋葬在美國緬因州。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thamsine Channon于1598年12月27日出生在英国英格兰戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗时，她的父亲Henry Channon16岁，母亲Johanna Drewe42岁。她于1622年11月28日与Francis Matthews在英国英格兰戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1690年在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯享年92岁，埋葬在美国缅因州。

nameMeanings.name: Channon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cannon
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Canann or Ó Canáin ‘descendant of Cano or Canán’. Occasionally, and in the Isle of Man, the surname derives from Mac Canann ‘son of Cano or Canán’, which in Ireland was Anglicized McCann or McConnon . See also Connon . The personal name is from Gaelic cano ‘wolf cub’, of which Canán is a diminutive. In Ulster Cannon may also be shortened from Ó Canannáin ‘descendant of Canannán’, a pet form (double diminutive) of the personal name. This was a cheiftan family in Donegal, and the name was particularly common there.

English: from Middle English canun ‘canon’ (Old Norman French canonie, canoine, from Late Latin canonicus). In medieval England this term denoted a clergyman living with others in a clergy house; the surname is mostly an occupational name for a servant in a house of canons, although it could also be a nickname or even a patronymic.

variants.name: Channing
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Channon  , see   Cannon  .

History: The earliest American Channing was John, who came from Dorset, England, in 1711 with his wife. Their son John became a prosperous merchant of Newport, RI, and their grandson William Ellery was born there in 1780. William Ellery Channing (1780–1842) was a Unitarian clergyman who founded the Massachusetts Peace Society, a precursor of the modern anti-war movement.

en.lifeSummary: When Thamsine Channon was born on 27 December 1598, in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Channon, was 16 and her mother, Johanna Drewe, was 42. She married Francis Matthews on 28 November 1622, in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1690, in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 92, and was buried in Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thamsine Channon est née le 27 décembre 1598, à Ottery St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Channon, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Johanna Drewe, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Matthews le 28 novembre 1622, à Ottery St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1690, à Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterrée à Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thamsine Channon am 27. Dezember 1598 in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Channon 16 und ihre Mutter Johanna Drewe 42. Sie hat am 28. November 1622 in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, United Kingdom Francis Matthews geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1690 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thamsine Channon è nata il il 27 dicembre 1598 nel Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Channon, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Johanna Drewe, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Francis Matthews il 28 novembre 1622, nel Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1690, nel Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolta a Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thamsine Channonが1598年12月27日にイギリスイギリスデボンオッテリー スト マリーで生まれた時，父Henry Channonは16歳，母Johanna Dreweは42歳であった。1622年11月28日にイギリスイギリスデボンオッテリー スト マリーでFrancis Matthewsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1690年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルヤーモウスで92歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thamsine Channon(이)가 1598년 12월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터이 스트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Channon(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Drewe(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1622년 11월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터이 스트 메리에서 Francis Matthews(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1690년 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 야모우스에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thamsine Channon nasceu em 27 de dezembro de 1598, em Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Channon, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Drewe, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Matthews em 28 de novembro de 1622, em Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1690, em Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 92 anos, e foi sepultada em Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thamsine Channon родилась 27 декабря 1598 г. в местности оттири ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Channon было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Drewe, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Matthews 28 ноября 1622 г. в местности оттири ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1690 г. в местности ярмоут, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 92 лет и была похоронена в местности Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thamsine Channon nació el 27 de diciembre de 1598, en Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Channon, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Johanna Drewe, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Francis Matthews el 28 de noviembre de 1622, en Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1690, en Yarmouth, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultada en Maine, Estados Unidos.
